text_block_list.text:
One day during training, Biwa Hayahide seems
rather preoccupied with her hand.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No, it's fine. I just ran out of hand cream.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I chose it specifically because the ingredients are
perfect for my skin, but there's a shortage right
now, so my hands are rougher than usual.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list:
Why don't we look for some other hand cream
for you?

Why don't we look for some other hand cream
for you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What? Oh no, I'm fine! I'm sure my usual hand
cream will be back in stock soon.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Er, this has nothing to do with my running, so you
don't have to check my hands or anything, right?

Biwa Hayahide seems rather abashed by the
condition of her skin.
